title: FormAssembly Connector
description: A FormAssembly connector that integrates a form with an external service such as Salesforce.

form_id.description: ID of the form this connector is attached to

name.description: Type/name of the connector (e.g., Salesforce, Email)

event.description: Form lifecycle event that triggers this connector

mapping.description: Field mapping configuration between form fields and the external service

login.description: Login credential for the connected external service

password.description: Password credential for the connected external service
